title: duravia bolanderi
intro: Duravia bolanderi, also known as Bolander's duravia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the southwestern United States. It is a shrub that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, with its health benefits attributed to its ability to promote healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Duravia bolanderi include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are often used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
